CHALLENGE DETAIL

Finish as White

Complete and submit one finished game where you played as White.

Start a real game as White, finish it, and return with the game ID or Chess.com game URL. Lichess and Chess.com are supported here today.
Reward: 90 points
Opening hint: This is the smallest step up from any finished game, keeping the focus on side awareness instead of winning, and it now supports both Lichess and Chess.com.
Your run

Saved Lichess username: and72nor

Saved Chess.com username: not set yet

For this challenge, automated verification currently uses the Lichess path.
